projectName: Understanding Terrorism: Root Causes and Prevention
projectDescription: An educational Next.js website created for a college Criminal Justice project, covering terrorism definitions, types, root causes, awareness, and community prevention strategies.
keyFeatures: Neutral academic definition of terrorism with factual language
Side-by-side comparison of domestic and foreign terrorism
Six root causes explorer with icon cards
Radicalization pathway visualization with intervention guidance
Awareness section on gradual radicalization and campus context
Prevention strategies and community action checklist
Curated external resources panel for further research
Fully accessible design with skip-to-content and ARIA support
Responsive layout using Tailwind CSS utility classes
Animated hero section with branded color palette
publicApiSurface: Icons (BookIcon, ShieldIcon, NetworkIcon, PeopleIcon, WarningIcon, CompassIcon, CheckIcon) — icons.tsx
Data exports: studyPrinciples, terrorismTypes, typeComparisons, rootCauses, radicalizationPath, awarenessPoints, preventionIdeas, communityActions, featuredResource — site-content.ts
